description: Discovers Ceph OSD daemons and monitors up/in status and capacity via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers OSDs from ceph_osd_metadata and collects per-OSD status. OSD down (up=0) triggers alert. OSD out (in_cluster=0) means data migration is occurring or imminent.
name: ODF_Ceph_OSD_Discovery
